{"persona":"prover","verdict":"conditional","summary":"One bounded correctness fix needed before merge.","findings":[{"severity":"warning","file":"src/queue.rs","line":41,"title":"Retry counter resets on requeue","detail":"put_back() zeroes attempts, so a message that keeps failing re-enters the queue forever and never reaches the dead-letter branch.","fix":"Carry the attempt count through put_back()."}]}
